title: Thursday Arabic Dawrah — The Sealed Nectar
about: A weekly ladies-only gathering studying Al-Rahīq Al-Makhtūm (The Sealed Nectar) — awarded first prize out of 171 manuscripts by the Muslim World League in 1979. Accompanied by selected excerpts from Fiqh al-Sīrah by Shaykh Ramadān al-Būtī.
subjects: Deepen your love for Rasulullah ﷺ
Learn about his remarkable life, teachings, and character
Embody his noble traits and qualities in daily life
